attributes.action: Cut all military and diplomatic ties with the genocidal state of Israel
attributes.additional_details:
The genocidal state of Israel has been committing a mass genocide in Gaza and ethnic cleansing in the west bank.

The government has been completely complisant from the very start and this complisantcy MUST END NOW!
attributes.background: We must have a military and economic embargo on the state of Israel with sanctions on all members of the Israeli government and military General staff.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Sever diplomatic, trade, and other relations with Israel and impose sanctions
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741435
